  1. uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.message

Uses of Package
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.message

Packages that use uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.message
Package
Description
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.chat
Core chat interface components for the Anahata ASI Swing UI.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.input
Provides the high-fidelity user input components for the Anahata Swing UI.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.message
Contains UI components for rendering different types of messages in the conversation.
  • Classes in uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.message used by uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.chat
    Class
    Description
    AbstractMessagePanel
    A base class for rendering AbstractMessage instances in a collapsible, diff-based UI component.
